_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for DISPLAYED prices, per-tier document allowances, and the Vault Keeper price — shared by the marketing site (homegoinghq.com) and the app (app.homegoinghq.com). Edit here, commit, and both update on next load. NOTE: the amount actually CHARGED lives in Stripe (the STRIPE_PRICE_* env vars); keep those in step when you change a dollar amount here.
